texto: Sometimes it's impossible to say certain things ... Writing is something needed by man to share experience.
explicacao: Citação de Arnošt Lustig sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Sometimes it's impossible to say certain things ... Writing is something needed by man to share e…” articula reflexao, writing, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Sometimes it's impossible to say certain things ... Writing is something needed by man to share experience.

texto: Some people know they'll live until spring and that's all they need to be happy. When I was feeling good, I just let the sun go down, knowing I'd see it again next morning. When I felt worse, and it didn't matter for what reasons, every sunset seemed to me like the end of the world. Maybe it's true, that the world dies every day at evening and is born again in the morning. But not always for everybody.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Arnošt Lustig: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Some people know they'll live until spring and that's all they need to be happy. When I was feeli…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, vida, sadness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e termino.

frase_original: Some people know they'll live until spring and that's all they need to be happy. When I was feeling good, I just let the sun go down, knowing I'd see it again next morning. When I felt worse, and it didn't matter for what reasons, every sunset seemed to me like the end of the world. Maybe it's true, that the world dies every day at evening and is born again in the morning. But not always for everybody.
